name: Payment gateway with multiple trusted groups
description: Transfer to payment gateway 0xc13f which trusts 7 groups including MetriTestSupergroup, CirclesBackers, and others. Solver can choose optimal group for minting. Tests that the solver picks the best group route when multiple are available. Source has 23 token types.
notes: Gateway trusts 7 groups. maxFlow=0.306 CRC. Solver picks optimal group from available options.
